name: err_unused_param
note: a declared param that is never referenced is a compile error

name: err_unclosed_expr
note: an unterminated {{ is a compile error

name: err_list_of_struct_redundant
note: list(struct(...)) is rejected in favour of the field shorthand
source:
---
allow_unused: true

params:
  - x = list(struct(name = str))
---
body

name: err_type_mismatch
note: passing the wrong type for a param fails validation at render

name: err_missing_required_param
note: omitting a required param fails validation at render

name: err_extra_param
note: passing an undeclared param fails validation at render

name: err_unknown_filter
note: an unknown filter name is rejected at compile

name: err_qualified_enum_default
note: a qualified Type.Variant in default position is rejected [D2]
source:
---
types:
  - Stage = enum(Design, Build)

allow_unused: true

params:
  - s = Stage := Stage.Build
---
body

name: err_undeclared_variable
note: referencing an undeclared variable is a COMPILE error in both backends [D3]

name: err_implicit_type_rejected
note: a param with a default but no explicit type is rejected [D4]

name: err_missing_type_annotation
note: a param with neither a type nor a default is rejected [D4]

name: leak_if_else_uses_value
note: using an option value in the else of `if has(o)` errors in BOTH backends (phase differs) [D1]

name: leak_negated_true_uses_value
note: using an option value inside `if !has(o)` errors in BOTH backends (phase differs) [D1]

name: leak_match_none_arm_uses_value
note: using an option value in the None arm of a match errors in BOTH backends (phase differs) [D1]
